content: Each AI request automatically deducts credits based on the feature and model in use, ensuring charges align with actual usage.

comment.text: This text explains how AI usage is billed – credits are deducted automatically based on the specific feature and model used. It appears as a descriptive step in the AI onboarding process within the Portal Settings, specifically on the AI service page. Translators should focus on conveying the automatic billing aspect.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Всеки' (masculine) is used with 'заявка' (feminine), which is a grammatical mismatch, but more critically, 'изважда' (to subtract/remove) is used in a way that sounds like a person is physically removing something, rather than a system deducting credits. However, the primary error is the gender mismatch 'Всеки заявка' which affects the basic accuracy of the sentence structure.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Всяка заявка към AI автоматично приспада кредити въз основа на използваната функция и модел, гарантирайки, че таксите съответстват на действителното използване.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Greek verb 'αποδίδει' (assigns/attributes) is used instead of 'αφαιρεί' (deducts). In the context of credits/billing, 'αποδίδει' implies giving credits, whereas the English text states they are being deducted/subtracted.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Κάθε αίτημα AI αφαιρεί αυτόματα πιστώσεις βάσει της λειτουργίας και του μοντέλου που χρησιμοποιούνται, διασφαλίζοντας ότι οι χρεώσεις αντιστοιχούν στην πραγματική χρήση.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Armenian verb 'կանգնացնում է' (kāngnac'num ē) means 'stops' or 'halts', whereas the English text uses 'deducts' (subtracts/removes). This completely changes the meaning from a billing process to a stopping process.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Յուրաքանչյուր AI հարցում ավտոմատ կերպով հանգեցնում է կրեդիտների կրճատման՝ հիմնվելով օգտագործվող առանձնահատկության և մոդելի վրա՝ ապահովելով, որ գանձումները համապատասխանեն իրական օգտագործմանը։

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The verb 'apturē' means 'to stop' or 'to arrest', whereas the English text uses 'deducts' (to subtract/take away). This changes the meaning from a billing process to a process of stopping credits.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Katrā AI pieprasījumā automātiski tiek atņemti kredīti, pamatojoties uz izmantotajām funkcijām un modeliem, nodrošinot, ka maksājumi atspoguļo patiešā lietojumu.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical gender error: 'žiadosť' (request) is a feminine noun in Slovak, but the adjective 'Každý' is masculine. It should be 'Každá'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Každá žiadosť AI automaticky odpočítava kredity na základe použitej funkcie a modelu, čím sa zabezpečí, že poplatky zodpovedajú skutočnému použitiu.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Albanian sentence structure 'Çdo kërkesë AI zbritet automatikisht kredite' is grammatically incorrect and changes the meaning. It literally translates to 'Every AI request is deducted automatically credits', making the 'request' the object being deducted rather than the 'credits'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Çdo kërkesë AI zbret automatikisht kredite bazuar në veçorinë dhe modelin e përdorur, duke siguruar që tarifat të përputhen me përdorimin real.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The verb 'списа' (spisa) is grammatically incorrect and does not exist in this form in Serbian. It should be 'списаће' (will deduct) or 'списати' (to deduct) to make sense in the sentence context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Сваки AI захтев аутоматски списаће кредите на основу функције и модела који се користе, чиме се осигурава да накнаде одговарају стварној употреби.
